basic_details.short_information: Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation (BMC) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 2 Sonologist Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 08-07-2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree/diploma/DNB in relevant subject, 1 year experience after PG, Registration with Maharashtra Medical Council and renewal certificate
qualification.details: Postgraduate degree/diploma/DNB in a relevant subject. 1 year of experience after completing postgraduate studies. Registration with the Maharashtra Medical Council and a valid renewal certificate.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs.250/- per sonography (general) or Rs.500/- per Anomaly scan/Color Doppler/2D Echo
salary_details.details: Rs.250/- per sonography (general) Rs.500/- per Anomaly scan/Color Doppler/2D Echo

selection_process: Document Verification Panel Selection by Executive Health Officer
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BMC Sonologist Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.mcgm.gov.in .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download BMC Sonologist Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.brihanmumbai_municipal_corporation_bmc: Rs.250/- per sonography (general) or Rs.500/- per Anomaly scan/Color Doppler/2D Echo
Postgraduate degree/diploma/DNB in relevant subject, 1 year experience after PG, Registration with Maharashtra Medical Council and renewal certificate

content_sections.heading: BMC Sonologist Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the BMC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download BMC Sonologist Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Postgraduate degree/diploma/DNB in a relevant subject. 1 year of experience after completing postgraduate studies. Registration with the Maharashtra Medical Council and a valid renewal certificate.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs.250/- per sonography (general) Rs.500/- per Anomaly scan/Color Doppler/2D Echo

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Document Verification Panel Selection by Executive Health Officer

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for BMC Sonologist Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.mcgm.gov.in . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BMC Sonologist recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the BMC Sonologist recruitment is 08-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Sonologist post?
faq.answer: There are 2 vacancies available for the Sonologist post in the Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Sonologist position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Sonologist position is 65 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the qualification required for the Sonologist post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a postgraduate degree/diploma/DNB in a relevant subject with 1 year of experience after PG and Maharashtra Medical Council registration.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary structure for the Sonologist role?
faq.answer: The salary is Rs.250/- per sonography (general) or Rs.500/- per Anomaly scan/Color Doppler/2D Echo.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the BMC Sonologist recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Document Verification and Panel Selection by the Executive Health Officer.

faq.question: Q9. Where should I send the application form?
faq.answer: The completed application form should be sent to the address mentioned in the official notification through Speed Post/Registered Post or as instructed.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, this is a contractual job opportunity with the Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation.
